libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Keep/configure test JVM args to open java.lang, e.g. `--add-opens=java.base/java.lang=ALL-UNNAMED`, when exercising OGNL reflection, constructor/static/member access, or Javassist-backed expression compilation. Do not set OGNL system properties globally unless a test specifically covers that behavior; if testing `ognl.security.manager`, `ognl.UseJDK9PlusAccessHandler`, `ognl.UseStricterInvocation`, or `ognl.UseFirstMatchGetSetLookup`, set and restore the property inside the test.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: OGNL 3.3.5 depends transitively on Javassist; extra Maven setup is not needed, but Javassist dynamic class generation may need guarded assertions in native-image runtime tests.
SecurityManager-related paths are JDK-version sensitive and may be unsupported or behave differently on JDK 25.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL has no external service or non-transitive test dependency requirement, but meaningful coverage of its reflective expression/runtime paths on JDK 9+ should preserve the existing JVM module opening used by the current tests.
